research.title: CVE-2026-0257 | Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Bypass Vulnerability | Active Exploitation
research.summary: A critical authentication bypass vulnerability affecting the GlobalProtect portal and gateway in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS allows attackers to bypass security restrictions and establish unauthorized VPN connections. The vulnerability stems from insufficient.

research.title: Popping Root on UniFi OS Server: Unauthenticated RCE Chain Detection & Analysis
research.summary: A three-part vulnerability chain in UniFi OS Server lets an unauthenticated attacker bypass the auth gateway, hit a command injection sink, and escalate to root in a single request. Bishop Fox confirmed the chain end to end and breaks down the attack, the.

research.title: Advancing Cybersecurity in the Age of Frontier AI: Qualys Steps into Project Glasswing
research.summary: The cybersecurity industry has spent much of the last two years debating how attackers might use AI. That debate matters, but it misses a larger point: defenders now have an opportunity to change the economics of cyber risk. For me, the question is not.
